# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: 3scale-app-backend-serviceentry
spec:
  ports:
    - name: internal
      number: 8080
      protocol: http

  hosts:
    - "backend"
    - "external"
  location: MESH_INTERNAL
  resolution: DNS


apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: 3scale-app-backend-virtualservice
spec:
  hosts:
    - backend
    - external
  gateways:
    - bookstore-gateway

  http: 
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: /
      rewrite:
        authority: backend-backend-default.prod.svc.cluster.local
      route:
        - destination:
            host: external
